description:
Permanent Marker Bullet Point (N850)
SKU: N850
Ink Colour
*
Features
• Excellent value bullet point permanent marker
• 4.2mm tip gives an approx. line width of 2.1mm
• Xylene & Toluene free
• Excellent value permanent markers with plastic barrels
• Low-odour, water-resistant ink
• Specially moulded, anti-roll cap
• Ideal for everyday use and suitable for use on most surfaces
• Also available in a 4-piece wallet:
N850-4A:
Four-piece Permanent Marker Bullet Point (4x Black)
